title: Time Controller
description: Experience seamless control over the flow of time in Minecraft with this mod. It allows you to accelerate, decelerate, or even halt time entirely, all through the use of specific items.
body: Time Control(ler) is a modern mod that allows you to speed up, slow down and stop time using 3 items. The mod works both **client and server side**. ### Installation Make sure you have the Fabric API and the correct version of this mod for your Minecraft version. That's it, you should have the mod working. ### FAQ #### How to control time? Using items that you can obtain in creative or commands. #### Is it possible to craft the control items in survival? No, but you can create your own recipes using datapacks or some other mods. ### Permissions Feel free to use this mod in **your** modpack 😃 Consider mentioning **mod** if you want to use this in video. ### Images
